MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-21-2021 IN 206, PLAINTIFF FLEXIBLE FUNDING LTD. LIABILITY CO.'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE AND TRIAL-RELATED DEADLINES WAS HEARD TOGETHER WITH MOTION IN CASE #CGC-19-578776. APPEARANCES VIA COURTCALL BY CATHERINE ROBERTSON, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF; DAVID SCHNEIDER, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION OVER OBJECTION OF DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL. IN ADDITION, THE COURT, ON ITS OWN MOTION, SINGLY ASSIGNED THIS CASE TO JUDGE GARRETT WONG IN DEPT. 504 AND SET A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE FOR 02/26/21 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 504. COUNSEL TO CONTACT JUDGE WONG VIA E-MAIL, TO ARRANGE ANY ZOOM CONFERENCES AND TO PROVIDE STATEMENTS. THE JURY TRIAL DATE OF 02/22/21 IS CONTINUED TO 12/13/21 IN DEPT. 504 AT 9:30 AM. ALL DEADLINES TO TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. MS. ROBERTSON TO SERVE ORDER. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/SKF)
